Perfect! All tests pass. Now let me create a summary of the changes made:
## Summary
I have successfully updated the test assertion strings in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/workspace/test_delete.py` to match the source code changes.
### Change Made
**File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/workspace/test_delete.py`
**Line 641:** Updated the assertion in test `test_delete_all_shows_closed_plan_status()` - **Before:** `assert "Plan #456 already closed" in result.output` - **After:** `assert "PR #456 already closed" in result.output`
This change aligns with the source code update in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/wt/delete_cmd.py` at line 140, where the user-facing output string was changed from "Plan #" to "PR #" for the already-closed plan message.
### Verification
All 24 tests in the test file pass successfully, confirming that the assertion update is correct and the test infrastructure is working properly.
